description: Look stylish with these black leather shoes in a classic design from red tape. These shoes with the tapered toe boxes are designed for comfort and will look great when teamed with chinos or pants and shirts for a casual look.Upper High quality leather upper for protection, comfort and durability Lightly embossed horizontal grooves on the forefoot for greater styke Tapered toe box for greater style Lace-ups for snug Fit Leather lined collar and tongue for greater comfort Midsole Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Rubber outsole with elevated triangular pattern for better grip Slightly elevated heel for better posture and height shoe careUse a branded shoe polish to keep your leather footwear clean and shiny
